generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who cares about national security, you should know that our allies aren't pulling their weight. Dr. Elena Vasquez, a former Pentagon strategist, explains how our overcommitment leaves us vulnerable. 'We're stretched too thin,' she warns. 'It's time to prioritize our own preparedness.' #NationalSecurityFirst
